creator: przemyslawx.lewandowski@intel.com
text:
CTX is locked first in iflib_device_register and second in iflib_media_status(here panic).
SIOCGIFMEDIA is received in iflib_if_ioctl(then ifmedia_ioctl -> iflib_media_status) but on 13.2 it is not sent from get_operstate_ether() in netlink module. On 14.0 is sent from netlink.
Can issue be related to ifnet_arrival_event? It needs to be investigated more.
